description:
Deadline reminder app for subscriptions, insurance, visas and more


What's New
- Easy Mode: larger text and simplified screens for everyone
- 4-digit PIN lock with Face ID / fingerprint unlock
- Apple Watch & Galaxy Watch: check deadlines and get notifications on your wrist
- Calendar import, desktop keyboard shortcuts, Japanese language support
Full Changelog: due2-v2.2.1...due2-v2.3.2
